meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve no design skills (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome no design skills. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve No Design Skills
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with UI design. Learn a professional client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to build high-end SaaS applications in record time.
content.answer_block: Eliminate design bottlenecks by adopting a component-first architecture. Use Antigravity to generate high-fidelity UI scaffolding and Claude Code to automate the implementation of complex business logic. This workflow transforms abstract client requirements into production-ready code, allowing you to ship professional-grade SaaS products without needing a dedicated design background.
content.intro:
The blank canvas is a freelancer’s worst enemy. You have the logic, the database schema, and the client’s vision, but every time you try to style a dashboard, it looks like a relic from 1998. You aren't a designer, and frankly, your clients don't pay you to be one—they pay you to solve their business problems at breakneck speed.

Today, we kill the 'I can't design' excuse. We are architecting a high-velocity workflow that leverages AI to handle the visual heavy lifting. By integrating Antigravity for rapid interface generation and Claude Code for surgical logic implementation, you can deliver pixel-perfect results that look like they came from a boutique agency, all while keeping your billable hours focused on high-value engineering.

steps.title: Define the Design System Architecture
steps.description: Establish a base design system using Shadcn/UI patterns to ensure consistency across all client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Tailwind-based design system configuration with a consistent color palette, spacing scale, and typography hierarchy optimized for SaaS dashboards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize tailwind config and global css variables for a clean, modern saas aesthetic'

steps.title: Generate Component Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to build out the structural components based on the client's functional requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive sidebar layout with integrated navigation, user profile dropdown, and a data-table component with sorting and filtering capabilities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a dashboard layout component using the defined design system'

steps.title: Automate State Management
steps.description: Implement robust state management to ensure the UI reacts correctly to user input without manual wiring.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React context provider for global user state and a custom hook for handling API-driven data fetching with loading and error states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement react-query integration for all data-fetching components'

steps.title: Inject Business Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map client data structures to your pre-built components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a utility function to transform raw API responses into the expected format for the data-table component.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'map the user data api response to the dashboard table columns'

steps.title: Final Polish & Deployment
steps.description: Run an audit of the codebase to ensure accessibility and performance benchmarks are met.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform an accessibility audit of the generated components and suggest improvements for screen-reader compatibility.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit the codebase for lighthouse performance best practices and optimize bundle size'

pro_tips: Always define your design tokens (colors, fonts) in a single config file before starting; it makes global rebranding for clients a 2-minute task.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests as you build; it forces cleaner component architecture and prevents regression bugs.
Treat your AI prompts as code; store your most successful Antigravity prompts in a shared repository to standardize your freelance output.
Never hand-code a form; use schema-based generation to ensure your client's data validation is always robust and consistent.
Leverage the 'Context' feature in Claude Code by pointing it to your documentation folder so it understands your specific project folder structure.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project folder structure and integrating the Antigravity prompt library to standardize your UI output.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting design limitations dictate your project velocity. With this workflow, you can ship professional-grade SaaS products that leave your clients speechless. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
